description: Hooks for fairseq2 repository - auto-loads doc-code-author skill

session:start.description: Load fairseq2 skill at session start
session:start.command: echo '📚 fairseq2 repository loaded. fairseq2 development skill is active. Source code in src/fairseq2/ is the source of truth.'

command:compact.description: Re-load fairseq2 skill after /compact to restore context

before:code.description: Remind to verify against source before writing code
before:code.command: echo '⚠️ Reminder: Verify APIs against src/fairseq2/ before writing code'
